mapper.update: UPDATE content SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE content SET likes_count = likes_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE content SET likes_count = likes_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE content SET favorites_count = favorites_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE content SET favorites_count = favorites_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE content SET comments_count = comments_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE content SET comments_count = comments_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM content WHERE status = 1 AND is_public = 1 ORDER BY views DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.tags, ',', numbers.n), ',', -1)) AS tag, COUNT(*) AS count, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS content_count FROM content c CROSS JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS n UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 ) numbers WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.status = 1 AND c.tags IS NOT NULL AND c.tags != '' AND numbers.n <= (LENGTH(c.tags) - LENGTH(REPLACE(c.tags, ',', '')) + 1) GROUP BY tag ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count, COUNT(*) AS content_count FROM content WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT id FROM content WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND tags IS NOT NULL AND FIND_IN_SET(#{tag}, tags) > 0

SELECT TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.tags, ',', n1.n), ',', -1)) AS tag1, TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.tags, ',', n2.n), ',', -1)) AS tag2, COUNT(*) AS cooccurrence FROM content c CROSS JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS n UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 ) n1 CROSS JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS n UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 ) n2 WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.status = 1 AND c.tags IS NOT NULL AND c.tags != '' AND n1.n <= (LENGTH(c.tags) - LENGTH(REPLACE(c.tags, ',', '')) + 1) AND n2.n <= (LENGTH(c.tags) - LENGTH(REPLACE(c.tags, ',', '')) + 1) AND TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.tags, ',', n1.n), ',', -1)) < TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.tags, ',', n2.n), ',', -1)) GROUP BY tag1, tag2 ORDER BY cooccurrence DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
